title: Household Items - Music Appreciation
note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
- Stuffed animals (T2)

title: Water Quality Test(s)
rationale: Supports citizen science project for Term 2.
note: There are many ways to do the citizen science project for Term 2 and students are encouraged to look over the project and participate in planning.  The website provides options for materials across a variety of different tests, including a free option for nitrate test strips.  These are good options, however, if teachers would prefer to order in advance and limit student planning.  Option 1 is a single test; option 2 is a test kit for a range of tests.

title: Glove
maySub: any baseball or softball glove. Make sure to get a glove that fits the right hand for left-handed students.

title: Food-Grade Sodium Hydroxide
rationale: The sodium hydroxide supplied in lab kits is not food-grade and is not for skin contact use.  If students would like to produce soap for use, then a food-grade chemical should be purchased.
qty: 1 for 1-4 students (possibly more depending on interest)

title: Food-Grade Sodium Alginate
rationale: The sodium alginate supplied in lab kits is not food-grade and NOT for consumption.  If students would like to eat the dessert caviar they make, they should obtain a food-grade chemical.
qty: 1 for 1-4 students (possibly more depending on interest)

title: Food-Grade Calcium Chloride
rationale: The calcium chloride supplied in lab kits is not food-grade and NOT for consumption.  If students would like to eat the dessert caviar they make, they should obtain a food-grade chemical.
qty: 1 for 1-4 students (possibly more depending on interest)

title: Pendant Trays
rationale: Can be used for an optional further project, making jewelry medallions. Various shapes and sizes are included.

qty: This package contains 60 pendant trays. One pendant per student per project is needed.
